evals.prompt: My bottom button is hidden behind the navigation bar after targeting SDK 35. How do I fix it?
evals.expected_output: Call enableEdgeToEdge() in onCreate before setContent, then apply safeDrawingPadding() or use Scaffold with innerPadding to ensure content avoids system bars.

evals.prompt: I'm using Scaffold with contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets.safeDrawing and also adding imePadding() on the content. The keyboard causes double padding. Why?
evals.expected_output: safeDrawing already includes IME insets. Adding imePadding() applies them again, causing double padding. Remove imePadding() when using contentWindowInsets = safeDrawing, or use fitInside(WindowInsetsRulers.Ime.current) instead.

assertions.description: Mentions removing imePadding or using fitInside

evals.prompt: My LazyColumn content gets clipped by the status bar. Items don't scroll behind the system bars.
evals.expected_output: Apply inset padding to the contentPadding parameter of LazyColumn, not as Modifier.padding() on its parent container. Parent padding clips the scroll area and prevents content from drawing behind system bars.

should_not_trigger: How do I optimize Jetpack Compose recomposition?
Set up Hilt dependency injection in my Android project
Migrate my XML layout to Jetpack Compose
How do I upgrade to AGP 9?
Configure R8 keep rules for my release build
